title: The Village Lady Podcast with Frances Robin
author: Frances Robin
description: The Frances Robin Podcast is a storytelling space about women learning to fully embrace their full selves. To make room to evolve and extend grace to, and love ourselves without apology. The goal is to empower women to take bold and courageous steps to live intentionally. To rid ourselves of perfectionist standards, embrace the lessons in failure, launch or relaunch at any age without fear, and regain our stories, voices, identities, and sense of self.
